arts.ttl: Newcastle United vs. Bournemouth: Head-to-head record and past meetings
arts.sum: Ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle and Bournemouth, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.

arts.ttl: Isak in 'red-hot form' - have Newcastle joined title race?
arts.sum: With Alexander Isak in "red-hot form" and Newcastle on a club record-equalling winning run, what can they achieve this season?

arts.ttl: Newcastle lineup vs. Bournemouth: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Newcastle United could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth lineup vs. Newcastle: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Bournemouth could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 'jinx' Eddie Howe must overcome as Isak joins all-time greats
arts.sum: United may have beaten three big beasts of late, and all away from home, but Bournemouth are the team in form who deny their supposed status as a small club surviving among the rich on 11,000 gates. Just to prove Alexander is an all-rounder apart from scoring two goals against Wolves midweek he got the assist for United's third tucked away by Anthony Gordon.

arts.ttl: Preview: Newcastle United vs. Bournemouth - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Bournemouth, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca sets Reece James target after late free-kick in Chelsea’s Bournemouth draw
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca has set Reece James the target of staying fit until the end of the season after he scored a stoppage-time free-kick on Tuesday night in the 2-2 draw with Bournemouth, writes Edmund Brack. The Blues captain marked his Premier League return from injury by scoring a 95th-minute equaliser with a pin-point free-kick.

arts.ttl: Where Newcastle United's FA Youth Cup winners of 1985 are now
arts.sum: From that victorious 1985 team, Paul Gascoigne went on to dazzle at the 1990 World Cup, while Joe Allon, Paul Stephenson, Brian Tinnion, Gary Kelly and Kevin Scott also made appearances for Newcastle United's first team. Born in Preston, this talented goalkeeper is the son of former Irish international keeper Alan Kelly Snr. After shining for United's youth team, he represented Ireland eight times at full level, making 53 appearances for the Toon.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak message speaks volumes after Eddie Howe's Newcastle United transfer update
arts.sum: Newcastle United playmaker Bruno Guimaraes has heaped praise on Magpies' striker Alexander Isak after the Swedish frontman wrote his name into the Premier League record books. Isak's excellent form in the Premier League this season - third in the goal-scoring charts behind Mohamed Salah and Erling Haaland - has seen him linked with moves to Arsenal and Barcelona, but the Magpies stance on selling their star man is clear.

arts.ttl: I would have broken Newcastle United's transfer record if my club got their way
arts.sum: Nicolai Jorgensen has revealed Newcastle United made bids 'far higher' than he expected - only for Feyenoord to turn them down. However, Feyenoord demanded more than £20m for Jorgensen, which would have been a record transfer for Newcastle at the time, and the Denmark international ultimately stayed put.
